title: chenopodium hircinum subsp. milleanum
intro: Chenopodium hircinum subsp. milleanum, also known as Russian melilot or hairy melilot, is a plant species belonging to the amaranth family (Amaranthaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Chenopodium hircinum subsp. milleanum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
